title: When to Ask for Help
drDigitalIntro: Some problems you can fix yourself, but some need a professional. Get help if: your computer makes unusual sounds (could be hardware failure), you see a blue or black screen you can't get out of, you suspect a virus, or you've tried the basics and nothing works. You can also search for help online — most error messages, if you copy them into a search engine, will show forum posts with solutions from others who had the same problem.

playgroundTask.goal: You found help for a computer problem

steps.say: Search for help on this error message.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched for help! Copying an error message into a search engine is often the fastest way to find a solution.
drDigitalHint: Read the error, then type it into the search bar to find help.
